extDescription.message: Select text on the web, add a comment, save locally, and export Markdown.

countUnit.description: Unit label shown next to the local note count.

obsidianLabel.description: Label for the Obsidian connection row.

obsidianStateConnected.description: Obsidian connection state when write permission is granted.

obsidianStateNotConnected.description: Obsidian connection state when no folder is saved.

obsidianStateReauthorizationRemembered.description: Obsidian connection state when the saved folder needs permission again.

obsidianStateReauthorizationRequired.description: Obsidian connection state when permission is denied.

obsidianStateUnsupported.description: Obsidian connection state when the browser lacks File System Access support.

connectObsidianFolderButton.description: Button label for first-time Obsidian folder authorization.

reconnectAndWriteObsidianButton.description: Button label when Obsidian permission must be renewed.

downloadAllButton.description: Button label for exporting all local notes.

connectedDirectorySummary.description: Small note shown when an Obsidian folder is connected.

changeFolderLink.description: Link label for choosing a different Obsidian folder.

chooseNewObsidianFolderStatus.description: Status shown before reauthorizing a new Obsidian folder.

connectedWritingPendingStatus.description: Status shown after connecting Obsidian before pending notes are appended.

noLocalNotesStatus.description: Status shown when the user exports before saving any notes.

exportDownloadedStatus.description: Status shown after exporting local notes.

reauthorizationRememberedStatus.message: Obsidian needs reauthorization (folder remembered). Local notes are still saved in the browser.
reauthorizationRememberedStatus.description: Status shown when a remembered folder needs permission again.

reauthorizationRequiredStatus.message: Obsidian needs reauthorization. Local notes are still saved in the browser.
reauthorizationRequiredStatus.description: Status shown when Obsidian permission was denied.

noPendingNotesStatus.description: Status shown when all local notes are already written to Obsidian.

writingObsidianStatus.description: Status shown while appending pending notes to Obsidian.

appendedToLogStatus.description: Status shown after pending notes are appended to the Obsidian log.

reconnectingObsidianFolderStatus.description: Status shown when reconnecting a remembered or denied Obsidian folder.

chooseObsidianFolderStatus.description: Status shown before first-time Obsidian folder authorization.

folderSelectionCancelledStatus.description: Status shown when the user cancels the folder picker.

unknownErrorStatus.description: Fallback status for unexpected errors without a message.

extensionDisconnectedRefresh.message: The extension was just updated. Refresh this page and try again.
extensionDisconnectedRefresh.description: Content script message shown when the injected page script lost connection to the extension.

selectionToolbarAria.description: ARIA label for the small selection action toolbar.

highlightOnlyAction.description: Tooltip and ARIA label for saving selected text without a comment.

addCommentAction.description: Tooltip and ARIA label for opening the comment editor.

editorDialogLabel.description: ARIA label for the comment editor dialog.

commentPlaceholder.description: Placeholder and ARIA label for the comment textarea.

saveAction.description: ARIA label for the comment editor save button.

saveFailedStatus.description: Fallback content script status when saving a note fails without a specific error.

logCommentPrefix.description: Prefix written before a saved comment in exported Markdown.

unknownSource.description: Markdown source label used when a note URL cannot be parsed.

invalidNoteError.message: Note data is missing or invalid.
invalidNoteError.description: Error shown when a note payload is missing or malformed.

requiredNoteFieldError.description: Error shown when a required note field is empty.

invalidNoteTimestampError.message: note.ts is not a valid time.
invalidNoteTimestampError.description: Error shown when a note timestamp cannot be parsed.

invalidNoteDateKeyError.description: Error shown when a note date key does not use the YYMMDD format.

obsidianWritePermissionMissingError.message: No write permission for the Obsidian folder.
obsidianWritePermissionMissingError.description: Error shown when the chosen Obsidian folder does not grant write permission.

obsidianFolderNotConnectedError.message: No Obsidian folder is connected yet.
obsidianFolderNotConnectedError.description: Error shown when a write is attempted before connecting a folder.

obsidianFolderNeedsReauthorizationError.message: The Obsidian folder needs reauthorization; local notes are still saved in the browser.
obsidianFolderNeedsReauthorizationError.description: Error shown when a saved Obsidian folder no longer has write permission.

fileSystemAccessUnsupportedError.message: This browser does not support the File System Access API.
fileSystemAccessUnsupportedError.description: Error shown when the browser cannot use folder authorization.

indexedDbOpenFailedError.description: Error shown when the saved folder handle database cannot open.

indexedDbOperationFailedError.description: Error shown when a saved folder handle database operation fails.

indexedDbOperationAbortedError.description: Error shown when a saved folder handle database operation is aborted.
